title: Osananajimi to wa Love Comedy ni Naranai

synonyms: No More Love With the Girls.
alternative_titles.en: You Can't Be In a Rom-Com with Your Childhood Friends!
alternative_titles.ja: 幼馴染とはラブコメにならない

synopsis:
As a romantic comedy enthusiast, Yonosuke "Eiyuu" Sakai enjoys the stories about childhood friends the most. But he solemnly believes that the flawless, loving childhood friends from his stories exist only in fiction. Though he has two childhood friends of his own—Shio Minamo and Akari Hiodoshi—Eiyuu has never seen either one of them as anything more.

However, now that they are all in high school together, the beauty of the two girls begins to catch Eiyuu's eye. As his interest subtly grows, the girls start to make advances toward him regardless of time or place—but only time will tell if Eiyuu will ever overcome his denial and finally see the girls in another light.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]
